# kn service examples

Use these commands as starting points:

```bash
kn service --help
kn service list
kn service describe <service-name>
kn service create <service-name> --image <image>
kn service update <service-name> --image <image>
kn service delete <service-name>
```

Use `kn service wait <service-name>` when you need to block until a service becomes ready.
